title: Wed 9/17 Class Info
content:
Hi Class,

You will see Professor Olson at the start of class. He teaches several sections of Corp 1. 

He will begin the Revenue Recognition lecture, and then I will pick up as soon as I can. 

 

Please welcome him, be on your A game, and be engaged :-) 

 

See you tomorrow,

Jeremiah
